overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail at night. The scene features a dark, atmospheric woodland environment with dense pine trees, distant mountains, and a cloudy night sky, with Geralt passing a lone NPC villager midway through the clip.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the forest floor
dense evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
distant mountain silhouette visible against the night sky
dark overcast sky with moonlight filtering through cloud breaks

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt forest trail at night, surrounded by dense pine trees with distant mountains visible under a cloudy, moonlit sky. The path winds gently through the woodland with no other characters present.

events.description: path curves slightly to the right as the terrain becomes rockier

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the forest becomes denser and the trail narrows slightly

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The forest closes in as Geralt progresses, with pine trees moving closer to the trail and a large rock outcrop appearing on the right. The path curves gently through the increasingly dense woodland.

events.description: encounters a villager standing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches and passes a villager standing on the trail, continuing forward without stopping

notable_agents.action: villager in blue tunic and brown pants standing on the path, then passed by Geralt

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a lone villager standing in the middle of the trail, passes by them, and continues deeper into the forest. The encounter briefly breaks the solitude of the woodland journey.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the trail as the forest opens up into a small clearing

entered.detail: open grassy area visible between the trees on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Past the encounter, the trail opens into a small clearing with grassy areas visible on the left. The forest remains dense ahead as Geralt continues his nocturnal journey through the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal forest trail that shifts from an open woodland into a dense thicket before reaching a small clearing. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt path surrounded by pine trees and distant mountains under a cloudy, moonlit sky. As he progresses, the forest closes in, with the trees crowding the trail and a large rock outcrop appearing on the right. The scene then shifts as Geralt approaches and passes a lone villager standing in the middle of the path, briefly breaking the solitude of the journey. Finally, the trail opens into a small clearing with grassy areas on the left before the path leads back into the dense wilderness ahead.
